detailed_analysis: rules_io.py is a Layer-3 interface adapter (architecture §4) providing generic Markdown parse/render for v0.5 `rules` artifacts. The module is small and cohesive: 164 lines, well under the 300-line module limit; two public functions plus two private coercion helpers and a thin pass-through for extract_pair_id. No God Module, no class, no deep nesting (max depth 2), no security smells (no secrets, no injection vector, no subprocess, no eval/pickle/yaml.load). The prior round-1 finding CQ-11 (Shotgun Surgery: per_agentic_tool_only/extra rebuilt by hand in three places) has been remediated — the shared canonical.apply_per_tool_partition helper is now used. The prior CQ-12 (Inappropriate Intimacy: importing 5+ underscore-prefixed helpers from claude_io/codex_io) is also resolved — all current imports are public symbols from artifact_names, canonical, and markdown_yaml_metadata_block, all inward (Layer-1/shared-helper) dependencies, so the Dependency Rule (§3) holds. Residual code-quality issues are minor: parse_rules_md takes 8 parameters (I3, standing CQ-10), and frontmatter scalar coercion via bare str(...) at lines 74 and 94 plus the permissive bool fallback in _coerce_bool (line 154) are weak-fail-fast points where a non-scalar YAML value is silently stringified rather than rejected. None of these caps a major axis. Spec/architecture conformance is good: the module carries US-01-per-tool and NFR-06 (round-trip stability), honours §5.1 adapter rules (unknown fields preserved via per_agentic_tool_extra; tool-only `trigger` partitioned so foreign fields do not leak), and correctly carries no NFR-15 secret-policy obligation (rules artifacts have no env/headers/auth.* fields, and the policy is a sync-core egress concern, not an adapter concern, per §1 and the goal-6 traceability row).

findings.problem: Eight parameters (one positional text, prior_canonical, and six keyword-only) exceed the >5 limit (Fowler I3). Three of them — artifact_path, canonical_name, and the default-name precedence — overlap in purpose (all feed name resolution). This is the standing CQ-10 finding from the round-2 audit; severity is INFO because the keyword-only block keeps call sites self-documenting and the signature must satisfy the ParseFn port contract.

Frontmatter scalar values are coerced with bare str(...) without validating they are actually scalars. A YAML mapping or list supplied for `description` or `pair_id` (e.g. description: {a: 1}) is silently stringified to the literal "{'a': 1}" rather than rejected at the boundary. This is a fail-fast gap (§8 of the guidelines: validate at boundaries, fail loud). pair_id additionally bypasses identity.validate_pair_id here, so a malformed pair_id is accepted as-is. This matches the standing SEC-C-parsing observation; low blast radius because rules frontmatter is author-controlled, hence MINOR.

An unrecognized string value for `private` (e.g. "maybe", "off", "") falls through to bool(value), where any non-empty string is truthy. "off" or "no_thanks" silently becomes private=True. Unlike _coerce_provenance directly above it (line 138-142), which raises ValueError on an unknown value, _coerce_bool fails open rather than loud. Inconsistent boundary discipline within the same module. MINOR: the affected field is a non-destructive privacy flag and inputs are author-controlled.

spec_conformance.notes: Layer-3 adapter; Dependency Rule (§3) upheld — imports only inward/shared helpers (artifact_names, canonical, markdown_yaml_metadata_block). §5.1 adapter rules satisfied: extract_pair_id_from_rules_md returns None on absence (rule 3), unknown fields preserved via apply_per_tool_partition into per_agentic_tool_extra (rule 4), tool-only `trigger` partitioned so foreign fields do not leak on render (rule 5, NFR-06). Carries US-01-per-tool and NFR-06 round-trip stability. No NFR-15/goal-6 obligation: rules artifacts have no env/headers/auth.* fields and secret_policy is a sync-core egress concern per the goal-6 traceability row, not an adapter responsibility. No I-3 archive-before-write obligation (adapter performs no destructive writes).

verdict_summary: Clean, cohesive Layer-3 adapter; prior shotgun-surgery and intimacy findings remediated; only minor weak-fail-fast boundary-coercion gaps and an 8-param signature remain.
